LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_1_.label: complimentary meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_2_.descr: The meal was an excellent bargain.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_2_.label: very cheap meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_3_.descr: The meal was a good value.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_3_.label: cheap meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_4_.label: fairly priced meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_5_.descr: The meal cost more than it should have.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_5_.label: expensive meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_6_.descr: The house charged an outrageous price for that meal.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_BoughtFood.stages.li_6_.label: very expensive meal
LanguageData.Gastronomy_HadToWait.stages.li.descripti: I had to wait too long before the house served my meal.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_HadToWait.stages.li.label: waited too long for service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Serviced.stages.li_1_.label: shoddy lounge service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Serviced.stages.li_2_.label: poor lounge service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Serviced.stages.li_3_.label: fair lounge service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Serviced.stages.li_4_.label: good lounge service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_Serviced.stages.li_5_.label: first-class lounge service
LanguageData.Gastronomy_ServicedMood.stages.li_1_.des: The lounge staff handled me poorly.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_ServicedMood.stages.li_2_.des: The lounge staff handled me poorly.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_ServicedMood.stages.li_3_.des: The lounge staff handled me well enough.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_ServicedMood.stages.li_4_.des: The lounge staff treated me well.
LanguageData.Gastronomy_ServicedMood.stages.li_5_.des: The lounge staff treated me like a proper high roller.
